---
title: 'HIT 1202/HIT 1203: Coursework Marks'
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document:
    includes:
      after_body:
      - include_footer.html
      before_body:
      - include_header.html
      
  
---
**Candidates may swiftly access their details by typing their surname or registration number into the search box located below.** 






```{r echo=FALSE}
library(readxl)
cw12022026<- read_excel("cw12022026.xlsx")
library(DT)
datatable(cw12022026, class = 'cell-border stripe',rownames = FALSE,  options = list(pageLength = 100, scrollX=T,columnDefs=list(list(targets=2,visible=TRUE),list(className = 'dt-center', targets = 1:15))) )%>%
  formatStyle(
    'T_1',
    color = styleInterval(c(0.495, 0.745), c('red', 'black', 'green')), fontWeight = 'bold') %>%
  formatPercentage('T_1', 0)%>%
formatStyle(
    'T_2',
    color = styleInterval(c(0.495, 0.745), c('red', 'black', 'green')), fontWeight = 'bold') %>%
  formatPercentage('T_2', 0)%>%
  formatStyle(
    'T_3',
    color = styleInterval(c(0.495, 0.745), c('red', 'black', 'green')), fontWeight = 'bold') %>%
  formatPercentage('T_3', 0)%>%
 formatStyle(
    'Q_1',
    color = styleInterval(c(0.495, 0.745), c('red', 'black', 'green')), fontWeight = 'bold') %>%
  formatPercentage('Q_1', 0)%>%
 
  formatStyle(
    'Q_2',
    color = styleInterval(c(0.495, 0.745), c('red', 'black', 'green')), fontWeight = 'bold') %>%
  formatPercentage('Q_2', 0)%>%
  formatStyle(
    'Q_3',
    color = styleInterval(c(0.495, 0.745), c('red', 'black', 'green')), fontWeight = 'bold') %>%
  formatPercentage('Q_3', 0)%>%
 
    formatStyle(
    'AS_1',
    color = styleInterval(c(0.495, 0.745), c('red', 'black', 'green')), fontWeight = 'bold') %>%
  formatPercentage('AS_1', 0)%>%
  formatStyle(
    'AS_2',
    color = styleInterval(c(0.495, 0.745), c('red', 'black', 'green')), fontWeight = 'bold') %>%
  formatPercentage('AS_2', 0)%>%
  formatStyle(
    'AS_3',
    color = styleInterval(c(0.495, 0.745), c('red', 'black', 'green')), fontWeight = 'bold') %>%
  formatPercentage('AS_3', 0)%>%
  formatStyle(
    'CW',
    color = styleInterval(c(0.49, 0.745), c('red', 'black', 'green')), fontWeight = 'bold') %>%
  formatPercentage('CW', 0)
  

```
